quests.name: Dragon Slayer
items: 3 map pieces (Melzar's Maze chest, Wormbrain the goblin, Dwarven Mines chest)
a ship (bought in Port Sarim) + Captain Ned, OR the Karamja-Crandor secret passage once found
antidragonbreathshield strongly recommended (sold by Oziach) - mitigates Elvarg's dragonfire but is not script-enforced as a hard block
quests.notes: Script-verified gate: dragon_journal.rs2:7 `if (%qp < 32)` blocks starting at the Champions' Guild - no quest or skill prerequisites, purely a QP threshold. This is THE central computation for the whole quest web: 62 other quests sum to 133 QP (quest.constant), so 32 is trivially reachable well before the endgame quests. Elvarg fight has no scripted level gate either - survivability is a judgment call for the player, not the engine. AP combat floor (JUDGMENT CALL, same convention as the KBD goal): 40 atk/str/def/hp for the mandatory kill of Elvarg (level 83; ai_queue3 in quest_dragon/scripts/elvarg.rs2 queues dragon_complete; Melzar's Maze lesser demon is 82). Curve: kill<15 none, 15-39 -> 25, 40-79 -> 30, 80-119 -> 40, 120+ -> 50. Not enforced in-game - logic-only, so the sim/validator/placement treat the quest as needing survivable combat caps first.

Curve: kill<15 none, 15-39 -> 25, 40-79 -> 30, 80-119 -> 40, 120+ -> 50. Not enforced in-game - logic-only, so the sim/validator/placement treat the quest as needing survivable combat caps first.

quests.name: Heroes' Quest
quests.notes: Script-verified at quest_hero.rs2:1-6 (has_hero_quest_requirements proc): %qp>=55 AND Lost City complete AND Dragon Slayer complete AND Merlin's Crystal complete AND (Shield of Arrav complete via either faction). The questsAny entry is a formality here since blackarmgang already folds both factions into one id (see that entry's notes) - kept in the schema/engine as a real OR-group mechanism for future entries. Feeds Legends' Quest. AP combat floor (JUDGMENT CALL, same convention as the KBD goal): 40 atk/str/def/hp for the mandatory kill of the Ice Queen (level 111; ice gloves (Ice Queen drop) are required for the Entrana firebird feather). Curve: kill<15 none, 15-39 -> 25, 40-79 -> 30, 80-119 -> 40, 120+ -> 50. Not enforced in-game - logic-only, so the sim/validator/placement treat the quest as needing survivable combat caps first.

quests.name: Legends' Quest
quests.notes: Script-verified at legends_guard.rs2:50-53 (quest chain: crest+hero+zombiequeen+upass+waterfall all complete, AND %qp>=107) and legends_journal.rs2/quest_legends.rs2 (the ten skill gates, all hard `if (stat(x) < N) return/block` checks scattered through the Kharazi Jungle dungeon). The single most skill-demanding quest in the set - deliberately the capstone this simulator uses to prove skill-cap unlocks matter. AP combat floor (JUDGMENT CALL, same convention as the KBD goal): 50 atk/str/def/hp for the mandatory kill of Nezikchened (level 187; ai_queue3 in quest_legends/scripts/nezikchened.rs2; the three Viyeldi warriors are 92-106). quests.name: Lost City
items: dramen_staff (the quest's own completion mechanic - NEVER hand this out as a filler reward, it would delete the quest's fetch step)
quests.notes: quest_zanaris.rs2:37,78 + zanaris_journal.rs2 gate on woodcutting>=36 (dramen branch) and crafting>=31 (lever mechanism). Opens Zanaris (fairy realm, reached via the dramen tree once the staff is crafted) and the Fairy Ring network in later revisions - not relevant to rev 274. Feeds Heroes' Quest. AP combat floor (JUDGMENT CALL, same convention as the KBD goal): 40 atk/str/def/hp for the mandatory kill of the Tree Spirit (level 101; ai_queue3 in quest_zanaris/scripts/tree_spirit.rs2 sets %zanaris). Curve: kill<15 none, 15-39 -> 25, 40-79 -> 30, 80-119 -> 40, 120+ -> 50. Not enforced in-game - logic-only, so the sim/validator/placement treat the quest as needing survivable combat caps first.

quests.name: Shilo Village
quests.notes: quest_zombiequeen.rs2:390 gates on agility>=32 (rope swing). The crafting gate (line 789-793) is tool-dependent: chisel needs only crafting>=9, spade needs 29, default 19 - modeled at the lowest reachable value (9) since any of the three tools completes the same step. Feeds Legends' Quest. AP combat floor (JUDGMENT CALL, same convention as the KBD goal): 40 atk/str/def/hp for the mandatory kill of Nazastarool (level 93; ai_queue3 in quest_zombiequeen/scripts/nazastarool.rs2 (three forms; level from era knowledge)). Curve: kill<15 none, 15-39 -> 25, 40-79 -> 30, 80-119 -> 40, 120+ -> 50. Not enforced in-game - logic-only, so the sim/validator/placement treat the quest as needing survivable combat caps first.
